items.name: theme
items.title: Hola theme
items.description: Hola UI design tokens — neutrals shifted toward brand hue, translucent overlay borders, asymmetric light/dark.

items.name: utils
items.title: cn helper
items.description: Standard shadcn cn() — twMerge(clsx(inputs)).

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Button on @base-ui/react, shadcn API (CVA + variant/size + data-slot), Catalyst-flavoured visual treatment.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Status pill / label, tinted-bg variants. useRender hook for polymorphism (no Base UI primitive needed — badges aren't interactive).

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Text input on @base-ui/react/input. Asymmetric light/dark surfaces (raised vs etched), translucent overlay borders, responsive typography.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input Group
items.description: Composable wrapper for inputs with icons, text addons, buttons. Group root carries the border + focus ring; children are transparent.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Accessible form label. Pairs with Input or used inside Field. data-slot=label.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Composition wrapper for form fields. Field, FieldSet, FieldGroup, FieldLabel, FieldDescription, FieldError, FieldSeparator + responsive orientation. data-invalid propagates danger colour.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Multi-line text input. Auto-grow with field-sizing-content, asymmetric light/dark, resize-y.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Checkbox on @base-ui/react/checkbox. Checked / unchecked / indeterminate states; accent fill when active.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Toggle switch on @base-ui/react/switch. Sizes: sm, default. Accent fill on, neutral surface off.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: Single-selection group on @base-ui/react/radio-group. Border becomes accent on selection; inner dot fills with accent.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Dropdown select on @base-ui/react/select. Trigger + portal-rendered content with items, groups, separators, and scroll buttons.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Range input on @base-ui/react/slider. Horizontal + vertical, single + multi-thumb range. Track / Indicator (filled range) / Thumb.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: Single on/off button on @base-ui/react/toggle. data-pressed for active state. Variants: default, outline. Sizes: sm, default, lg.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: Group of toggles on @base-ui/react/toggle-group. Single or multiple selection; spacing=0 collapses into a segmented control with merged borders.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Horizontal or vertical divider on @base-ui/react/separator. Translucent overlay. `soft` prop for half-opacity inside cards.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Image avatar with fallback on @base-ui/react/avatar. Sizes sm/default/lg, shapes circle/square. Plus AvatarBadge (status dot), AvatarGroup (overlapping stack), AvatarGroupCount (+N).

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog on @base-ui/react/dialog. Portal + backdrop + popup, with translucent overlay border, soft shadow, and asymmetric light/dark surface. Sizes sm/default/lg/xl. Includes header, footer, title, description, close.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: Modal confirmation on @base-ui/react/alert-dialog. Same visuals as Dialog but role=alertdialog, no dismiss-on-backdrop and no X — user must explicitly Action or Cancel. Sizes sm/default/lg/xl.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Edge-anchored panel on @base-ui/react/dialog. Slides in from top, right (default), bottom, or left. Translucent inward-facing border, same surface treatment as Dialog. Backdrop + Escape dismiss work.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Hover/focus hint on @base-ui/react/tooltip. Provider wraps the app with a single delay; each Tooltip anchors to its trigger via Positioner. Inverted surface, soft shadow, arrow tracks the side. Sides: top/right/bottom/left.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Click-anchored interactive panel on @base-ui/react/popover. Same Positioner anchoring as Tooltip but focusable and content-rich. Translucent overlay border, soft shadow, asymmetric light/dark surface. Sides: top/right/bottom (default)/left.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover Card
items.description: Hover/focus-anchored rich preview on @base-ui/react/preview-card. Same Positioner anchoring as Popover but opens on pointer hover or keyboard focus — for profile cards, link previews, and other inline expansions.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Anchored menu on @base-ui/react/menu. Items with optional shortcuts, destructive variant, checkbox items, radio groups, labels, separators, and nested submenus via SubmenuRoot/SubmenuTrigger.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: Right-click anchored menu on @base-ui/react/context-menu. Shares the Menu primitive's items, groups, separators, shortcuts, checkbox/radio items, and nested submenus — opens at the pointer on contextmenu events.

items.name: menubar
items.title: Menubar
items.description: Horizontal application menu on @base-ui/react/menubar. A row of triggers that each open a Dropdown Menu — siblings share keyboard navigation. Inherits every item type from Dropdown Menu (checkbox, radio, submenu, destructive, shortcut).

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Vertically stacked, expandable sections on @base-ui/react/accordion. Translucent divider borders, chevron flips via data-[panel-open], panel height animates via Base UI's --accordion-panel-height CSS var. Supports single-open (default) and multiple-open via `multiple` prop.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Behavioural primitive on @base-ui/react/collapsible — Root, Trigger, Panel. Ships unstyled so consumers compose visuals; animate the panel via Base UI's --collapsible-panel-height CSS var.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Switchable panels on @base-ui/react/tabs. Two list variants: pill-style (default — filled bar with raised active tab) and line (underline-style). Horizontal (default) and vertical orientations.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Inline static notification. Variants: default (neutral) and destructive (red). Title + description with optional leading icon, grid-anchored to the text column.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Determinate or indeterminate progress on @base-ui/react/progress. Track + Indicator scale with value (0–100). Optional Label and Value parts compose around the bar. Indeterminate state pulses.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Styled native HTML table — Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption. Row borders use translucent --hola-fg overlays; hover and selected states tint subtly.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: Custom-styled scrollbar overlay on @base-ui/react/scroll-area. Viewport handles overflow; vertical + horizontal scrollbars are thin rounded thumbs that tint with the underlying surface and only appear when content overflows.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Hierarchical navigation trail. Composed of Breadcrumb → List → Item → Link/Page with optional Separator and Ellipsis. BreadcrumbLink supports a render prop via Base UI's useRender for routing libraries.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Page navigation built on Button. PaginationLink renders as an <a> via Base UI render-prop polymorphism; active link uses outline variant + aria-current=page. Previous/Next labels, ellipsis stand-in for collapsed ranges.

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu
items.description: Top-level site navigation on @base-ui/react/navigation-menu. Sibling triggers share a single floating popup that animates between activation directions; links inside content panels are keyboard-navigable.
